name: breadcrumb-link
visual_summary: The breadcrumb-link is a clickable navigation item that displays a text label, commonly used in breadcrumb menus to represent a specific step or location within a hierarchical structure. It is typically placed between breadcrumb separators and can be used to highlight important steps or provide additional context. Breadcrumb-links can be used in conjunction with other navigation components to create a clear and organized breadcrumb menu.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: breadcrumb-link
Description: The breadcrumb-link is a clickable navigation item that displays a text label, commonly used in breadcrumb menus to represent a specific step or location within a hierarchical structure. It is typically placed between breadcrumb separators and can be used to highlight important steps or provide additional context. Breadcrumb-links can be used in conjunction with other navigation components to create a clear and organized breadcrumb menu.
Style: e.g. material, flat
Interactions: e.g. clickable, tappable
Tags: breadcrumb, link, navigation, menu

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
